span.p: BACKWARD: new schema reads old data - safe to add optional fields

span.p: FORWARD: old schema reads new data - safe to add then drop later

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: FULL: both directions - most constrained, additive-only

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Breaking change unavoidable e.g. rename, type change?
